title: Palmier phone-bridge evaluation: not applicable to WKAppBot Android
desc: Palmier (YC S24) is a dev coding agent triggered by GitHub/Slack, not a phone-bridge for AI desktop agents. HN title was misleading. WKAppBot Android module (ADB-based test automation) has no overlap. Evaluated 2026-04-23.
steps: 1. Palmier: GitHub PR/issue triage + Slack-triggered code review agent. NOT a phone-to-desktop bridge.
2. WKAppBot Android: ADB-based UI automation for test scenarios. Different domain entirely.
3. No action needed. If mobile remote control of Eye is wanted, implement as separate Slack/webhook endpoint in Eye (not Palmier integration).
4. Competitive watch: Palmier YC S24 -- monitor if they pivot to desktop agent control.
author: claude
